title: How to Sell Ebooks from Kenya: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: As a digital creator in Kenya, you've probably encountered the frustration of trying to sell ebooks with PayPal or Stripe, only to be met with a 'restricted' message. Your audience is eager to buy, but you're stuck with a payment system that doesn't serve you. This is a tale of a creator who can't get paid due to geographic restrictions. You're not alone. Many have faced this challenge. The solution lies in embracing blockchain-based payments, which bypass traditional payment processors and their limitations. You can sell ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without breaking the bank or navigating complex regulations.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Most payment processors rely on centralized systems that are vulnerable to geo-restrictions and other limitations. In contrast, blockchain-based payments are decentralized and use cryptographic techniques to facilitate secure transactions. This means you can sell ebooks to anyone, regardless of their location or the restrictions in place. The beauty of this approach lies in its simplicity and reliability. Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you can focus on creating more content and growing your business without worrying about payment processing issues.
What You Need Before You Start

To sell ebooks in Kenya using blockchain-based payments, you'll need to invest in a reliable solution like the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce. This comprehensive bundle includes a backend engine, wallet integration, and administrative tools to help you manage your sales and customers. You'll also need to set up a NOWPayments account, which offers a wide range of cryptocurrencies and a user-friendly interface. Make sure you have a digital product ready for sale, such as an ebook, and a way to deliver it to customers.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

The first step is to set up your payment pipeline using NOWPayments. This involves creating a merchant account, configuring your payment settings, and generating a unique payment address. Next, you'll need to integrate your wallet with the Full Stack Bundle, which will enable customers to make payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. Finally, you'll need to configure your delivery settings to ensure that customers receive their ebooks promptly after payment.
You can sell ebooks to anyone, anywhere, without breaking the bank or navigating complex regulations.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and start selling your ebooks. Promote your products on social media, email, or other marketing channels to attract customers. When a customer makes a payment, the Full Stack Bundle will automatically deliver the ebook to their wallet. Monitor your sales and customer activity using the administrative tools provided by Unchained Commerce.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Full Stack Bundle brings together every component needed to build a global digital store: the Core Shop Engine for backend payment verification and automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for the buyer-facing checkout experience, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction tracking and order management. For creators in restricted markets, this is not a luxury — it is the minimum viable infrastructure for a professional digital business. The bundle includes a deployment guide, priority updates, and Discord support. Total cost is a one-time payment of $79.99. There are no monthly fees, no percentage cuts on sales, and no platform relationship that can be terminated by someone else's compliance decision.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

Will I need to create a buyer account with NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce? No, you don't need to create a buyer account with NOWPayments or Unchained Commerce. Our solution is designed to be seamless and hassle-free for both creators and customers. All you need is a digital product to sell and a way to deliver it to customers.
The Full Stack Bundle offers a comprehensive solution for managing sales and customers.

If you're interested in selling digital products beyond ebooks, such as courses, software, or templates, consider investing in the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce. This comprehensive platform offers a wide range of features and tools to help you grow your business. Additionally, explore other topics related to blockchain-based payments, such as the benefits of using cryptocurrencies and the importance of secure transactions.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a concrete action plan to get you started: 1. Sign up for a NOWPayments account and set up your payment settings. 2. Invest in the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce and integrate your wallet. 3. Create a digital product to sell, such as an ebook. 4. Configure your delivery settings to ensure prompt delivery of ebooks after payment. 5. Promote your products on social media, email, or other marketing channels to attract customers. 6. Don't forget to configure your delivery settings to ensure prompt delivery of ebooks after payment.
